---
title: "Run (Windows)"
lang: en
---

<!-- Windows: how to run start.bat, getting past SmartScreen. -->

## Run `start.bat`

TODO: Double-click `scripts/windows/start.bat`, approve the UAC prompt.

## Getting past SmartScreen

TODO: Screenshot + "More info → Run anyway" steps.

## What happens

TODO: Describe the steps the script performs and expected output.
